title: Plutarch, Moralia: To an Uneducated Ruler
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: To an Uneducated Ruler.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: To an Uneducated Ruler.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'To an Uneducated Ruler': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
